---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
<!-- A clear description of the feature or improvement -->

**Use case**
<!-- Why do you need this? What problem does it solve? -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Have you tried any workarounds or considered other approaches? -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Examples of findings you wish the sweep would catch, other tools that handle this well, or anything else that helps explain the idea -->
